Drednaw

#0833 Chewtle #0835 Yamper
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Drednaw is a Water/Rock type Pokémon introduced in Generation 8.

Drednaw is known to be extremely vicious. Its fangs are strong and sharp enough to bite through rock and iron. Though Drednaw has an extremely heavy rock shell, its well-developed muscles allow it to move quickly.

Drednaw has a Gigantamax form available in Pokémon Sword/Shield, with an exclusive G-Max move, G-Max Stonesurge.

Drednaw

Additional artwork

Weight 115.5 kg (254.6 lbs)

Training

EV yield 2 Attack
Catch rate 75 (9.8% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 170
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Monster, Water 1
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

#0833
Chewtle

Drednaw
Water · Rock

Pokédex entries

Drednaw

Sword With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.
Shield This Pokémon rapidly extends its retractable neck to sink its sharp fangs into distant enemies and take them down.
Scarlet Its massive, jagged teeth can crush a boulder in a single bite. This Pokémon has an extremely vicious disposition.
Violet Drednaw lurks along the shoreline. When prey come to drink water, Drednaw stretches its neck out and chomps down on them.

Gigantamax

Sword It responded to Gigantamax energy by becoming bipedal. First it comes crashing down on foes, and then it finishes them off with its massive jaws.
Shield In the Galar region, there’s a tale about this Pokémon chewing up a mountain and using the rubble to stop a flood.

Moves learned by Drednaw

  • In other generations
  • 8
  • 9
Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Drednaw does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Drednaw cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Name origin

dreadnought
a battleship
gnaw
to bite or chew
#0833 Chewtle #0835 Yamper
